headline: Is Ondas in Play? Potential Acquirers Eye This Autonomous-Defense Specialist.
summary: Ondas has quietly assembled a counter-drone, loitering munitions, and agentic-AI portfolio that looks more like a prime contractor's missing puzzle piece than a standalone small-cap. Four defense giants are sizing it up, and the ranking of who fits best may surprise you.

content.title: Is Ondas in Play? Potential Acquirers Eye This Autonomous-Defense Specialist.

headline: RTX stock jumps as company lifts guidance after Q2 beat
summary: Investing.com -- Shares in RTX Corp jumped in premarket trading Thursday after the aerospace and defense giant reported second-quarter earnings well ahead of Wall Street estimates and raised its full-year guidance across the board.

headline: RTX Stock Rises After Strong Earnings but Faces Two Iran War Headwinds
summary: Amid war and rising oil prices,  RTX  delivered the kind of quarters investors craved: A beat-and-raise.  Financial guidance was raised, too.  For 2026, RTX now expects sales of about $95.5 billion, up from prior guidance of $93 billion.

headline: RTX raises full-year outlook after strong second-quarter earnings (NYSE:RTX)
summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) shares surged nearly 6% in premarket trading on Thursday after the aerospace and defence company reported second-quarter earnings and revenue ahead of Wall Street expectations while increasing its financial guidance for the full year. The stronger outlook reflected robust demand across both its commercial aerospace and defence businesses, supported by a record order backlog.

content.title: RTX raises full-year outlook after strong second-quarter earnings (NYSE:RTX)
content.summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) shares surged nearly 6% in premarket trading on Thursday after the aerospace and defence company reported second-quarter earnings and revenue ahead of Wall Street expectations while increasing its financial guidance for the full year. The stronger outlook reflected robust demand across both its commercial aerospace and defence businesses, supported by a record order backlog.

headline: RTX (NYSE:RTX) Reports Upbeat Q2 CY2026, Stock Soars
summary: Aerospace and defense company Raytheon (NYSE:RTX) reported Q2 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 14.5% year on year to $24.71 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $95.5 billion at the midpoint came in 1.5% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.89 per share was 13.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: RTX (NYSE:RTX) Reports Upbeat Q2 CY2026, Stock Soars
content.summary: Aerospace and defense company Raytheon (NYSE:RTX) reported Q2 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 14.5% year on year to $24.71 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $95.5 billion at the midpoint came in 1.5% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.89 per share was 13.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Lockheed Martin Rockets 10%, RTX Jumps 7% on Beat-and-Raise Quarters and Record Backlogs
summary: While the broader market sank Thursday morning, two defense giants defied the selloff with blowout quarters and backlogs that shattered records, raising a pointed question about how much runway remains for investors who missed the initial pop.
